CustomField.description: Select this option to restrict invoice creation for this contract. The Invoice Creation Restriction setting inherits its value from the account level. You can override this setting here at the contract level if needed.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select this option to restrict invoice creation for this contract. The Invoice Creation Restriction setting inherits its value from the account level. You can override this setting here at the contract level if needed.
CustomField.label: Invoice Creation Restriction
